message:
fix(ui): proper loading indicator for main frame navigation only

- Separate handlers for Page.frameNavigated (actual page load) and
  Page.navigatedWithinDocument (SPA navigation)
- Only show stop icon for main frame navigation (no parentId)
- SPA navigation (pushState/hash) updates URL without loading indicator
- Fix toolbar width using column-based sizing to match content
- Fix refresh button flashing by only re-rendering on state change
